LanguageData.SY_CA.TooltipArmorRating_Sharp: Set the armor rating against sharp damage Even though more can be typed in, 200% is the upper limit
LanguageData.SY_CA.TooltipArmorRating_Blunt: Set the armor rating against blunt damage Even though more can be typed in, 200% is the upper limit
LanguageData.SY_CA.TooltipArmorRating_Heat: Set the armor rating against heat damage Even though more can be typed in, 200% is the upper limit
LanguageData.SY_CA.TooltipAttackPowerModifier: Modify the damage dealt by this animal's attacks Values greater than 1 increase damage and damager per second Values less than 1 decrease damage and damage per second
LanguageData.SY_CA.TooltipAttackPowerModifierGlobal: Modify the damage dealt by all animals Values greater than 1 increase damage and damager per second Values less than 1 decrease damage and damage per second
LanguageData.SY_CA.TooltipAttackCooldownModifier: Modify the cooldown of this animal's attacks Values greater than 1 increase the cooldown, reducing the damager per second Values less than 1 decrease the cooldown, increasing the damage per second
LanguageData.SY_CA.TooltipAttackCooldownModifierGloba: Modify the cooldown of all animal's attacks Values greater than 1 decrease attack speed and damager per second Values less than 1 increase attack speed and damage per second
LanguageData.SY_CA.TooltipBodySize: Set the body size of this animal Body size affects the amount of meat and leather gained from slaughtering as well as carrying capacity, but not for example hitpoints or damage dealt!
LanguageData.SY_CA.TooltipBodySizeGlobal: Set a body size modifier for all animals Body size affects the amount of meat and leather gained from slaughtering as well as carrying capacity, but not for example hitpoints or damage dealt!
LanguageData.SY_CA.TooltipCaravanRidingSpeed: Set the caravan riding speed factor for this animal
LanguageData.SY_CA.TooltipCaravanRidingSpeedChk: Set the animal to be rideable for caravans
LanguageData.SY_CA.TooltipCaravanRidingSpeedGlobal: Set a caravan riding speed modifier for all animals This will only affect animals which are rideable!
LanguageData.SY_CA.TooltipCarryingCapacity: Set the carrying capacity for this animal Carrying capacity defines the size of items an animal can carry when hauling Will not affect mass capacity for caravans unless the setting for it is enabled under global settings
LanguageData.SY_CA.TooltipMinCarryingCapacity: Set a minimum carrying capacity modifier for all animals Actual carrying capacity depends on body size and the manipulation stat Will not affect mass capacity for caravans unless the setting for it is enabled under global settings
LanguageData.SY_CA.TooltipMaxCarryingCapacity: Set a maximum carrying capacity modifier for all animals Actual carrying capacity depends on body size and the manipulation stat Will not affect mass capacity for caravans unless the setting for it is enabled under global settings
LanguageData.SY_CA.TooltipAffectsMassCapacity: Make carrying capacity affect caravan mass capacity for all animals Base carrying capacity value for animals is 75, higher increases the mass that can be carried, lower will decreases it (This only matters for pack animals + humans)
LanguageData.SY_CA.TooltipDrawSize: Changing the draw size requires restarting the game to take effect
LanguageData.SY_CA.TooltipDrawSizeGlobal: Changing the draw size requires restarting the game to take effect
LanguageData.SY_CA.TooltipEggLayerIntervalDays: Interval between each egg laying in days
LanguageData.SY_CA.TooltipEggLayerDaysToHatch: Time until the eggs hatch in days
LanguageData.SY_CA.TooltipEggLayerCountRangeMin: Minimum number of eggs per batch
LanguageData.SY_CA.TooltipEggLayerCountRangeMax: Maximum number of eggs per batch
LanguageData.SY_CA.TooltipEggLayerFertilizationCountM: Number of fertilizations per egg laying Multiple fertilizations will lead to multiple eggs being laid, I think...
LanguageData.SY_CA.TooltipEggLayerFemaleOnly: Allow males to lay eggs This setting only makes sense if the animal can lay unfertilized eggs, as males can never be fertilized
LanguageData.SY_CA.EggBodySizeMass: Egg mass set via body size
LanguageData.SY_CA.TooltipEggBodySizeMass:
Enabling this setting will set the mass of all eggs depending on the parent animal's body size: egg_mass = baseBodySize * mass_factor
Using chickens as default gives a factor of 0.5: mass_factor = egg_mass (0.15) / baseBodySize (0.3)
LanguageData.SY_CA.EggBodySizeNutrition: Egg nutrition set via body size
LanguageData.SY_CA.TooltipEggBodySizeNutrition:
Enabling this setting will set the nutrition of all eggs depending on the parent animal's body size: egg_nutrition = baseBodySize * nutrition_factor
Using chickens as default gives a factor of 0.8333333: nutrition_factor = egg_nutrition (0.25) / baseBodySize (0.3)
LanguageData.SY_CA.TooltipFilthRate: Set amount of filth produced by this animal
LanguageData.SY_CA.TooltipMaximumFilthRate: Limit the filth rate of all animals to this maximum
LanguageData.SY_CA.TooltipFoodTypeAdd: Click and select items on the dropdown menu to allow a food type for this animal
LanguageData.SY_CA.TooltipFoodTypeRemove: Click and select items on the dropdown menu to disallow a food type for this animal
LanguageData.SY_CA.TooltipGlobalSettings: Allows modifying all animals at once
LanguageData.SY_CA.DialogGlobalSettingsResetAll: All settings for 'Customize Animals' will be reset
LanguageData.SY_CA.TooltipFilter: Apply a filter to the list Use * to filter for modified entries
LanguageData.SY_CA.TooltipGestationPeriodDays: Adjust the gestation period for this animal Negative values disables pregnancies
LanguageData.SY_CA.TooltipGestationPeriodDaysGlobal: Set a gestation period modifier for all animals
LanguageData.SY_CA.TooltipGrowthTierPointsRequirement: Points required to reach this growth tier
LanguageData.SY_CA.TooltipPassionGainsPerTier: Passions gained at this growth tier
LanguageData.SY_CA.PassionChoicesPerTier: Passion choices gained at Growth Tier
LanguageData.SY_CA.TooltipPassionChoicesPerTier: Passion choices gained at this growth tier
LanguageData.SY_CA.TooltipTraitGainsPerTier: Traits gained at this growth tier
LanguageData.SY_CA.TraitChoicesPerTier: Trait choices gained at Growth Tier
LanguageData.SY_CA.TooltipTraitChoicesPerTier: Trait choices gained at this growth tier
LanguageData.SY_CA.TooltipGrowthMomentAges: The age at which a child experiences this growth moment
LanguageData.SY_CA.TooltipHealthScale: Set the hit points of this animal, it also affects their body part hit points Be careful when reducing this value as animals with many wounds or scars can lose body parts or instantly die!
LanguageData.SY_CA.TooltipHealthScaleGlobal: Set a health modifier for all animals Increases or decreases health for all animals by a factor
LanguageData.SY_CA.TooltipHungerRate: Adjust the hunger rate of this animal
LanguageData.SY_CA.TooltipMinHungerRate: Adjust the minimum hunger rate of all animals
LanguageData.SY_CA.TooltipMaxHungerRate: Adjust the maximum hunger rate of all animals
LanguageData.SY_CA.TooltipLeatherAmount: Set the amount of leather on this animal You should not change this value if it is 0 by default
LanguageData.SY_CA.TooltipLeatherAmountGlobal: Set a leather amount modifier for all animals Increases or decreases the amount of leather on all animals by a factor
LanguageData.SY_CA.TooltipLifeExpectancy: Set the life of expectancy of this animal No idea why you would ever need or want to change this, but hey ... you can. Really does not have as much effect as one would expect it to have
LanguageData.SY_CA.TooltipLifeExpectancyGlobal: Set a life expectancy modifier for all animals
LanguageData.SY_CA.TooltipLifeStageAgeMinAge: The age at which this animal will reach the respective life stage For most game mechanics, the "Adult" life stage is the only important factor
LanguageData.SY_CA.TooltipLitterSizeCurve: Litter size is determined using a curve with points, each with a value for "litter size" and its "probability" A valid curve requires at least 3 points and must start and end with a point with probability at 0, otherwise the litter size is set to 1
LanguageData.SY_CA.TooltipLitterSizeCurveInvalidCount: Invalid number of points: 3 or more points are required and start/end points must have probability of 0
LanguageData.SY_CA.TooltipLitterSizeCurveInvalidStart: Invalid start/end: curve has to start and end with a probability of 0
LanguageData.SY_CA.TooltipManhunterOnTameFail: Set the chance with which an animal will seek revenge on a failed tame attempt The actual chance is also affected by the tamer's skill
LanguageData.SY_CA.ManhunterOnTameFailRange: Revenge chance on tame fail range
LanguageData.SY_CA.TooltipMinManhunterOnTameFail: Set the lowest allowed chance for revenge on a tame fail
LanguageData.SY_CA.TooltipMaxManhunterOnTameFail: Set the highest allowed for revenge on a tame fail
LanguageData.SY_CA.TooltipManhunterOnDamage: Set the chance with which an animal will seek revenge when harmed The actual chance is also affected by the hunter's skill, weapon and range to the target
LanguageData.SY_CA.TooltipMinManhunterOnDamage: Set the lowest allowed chance for revenge on being harmed
LanguageData.SY_CA.TooltipMaxManhunterOnDamage: Set the highest allowed chance for revenge on being harmed
LanguageData.SY_CA.TooltipMarketValue: Set the market value of this animal
LanguageData.SY_CA.TooltipMarketValueGlobal: Set a market value modifier for all animals
LanguageData.SY_CA.TooltipMateMtbHours: Adjust the mean time before an animal will mate A value of 0 disables mating
LanguageData.SY_CA.TooltipMateMtbHoursGlobal: Set a modifier for all animals to adjust the mean time before the animal will mate Very small modifiers can cause the time become 0, which disables mating
LanguageData.SY_CA.TooltipMeatAmount: Set the amount of meat on this animal You should not change this value if it is 0 by default
LanguageData.SY_CA.TooltipMeatAmountGlobal: Set a meat amount modifier for all animals Increases or decreases the amount of meat on all animals by a factor
LanguageData.SY_CA.TooltipMilkableIsMilkable: Set the milkability for this animal Changing this setting requires reloading to apply the settings!
LanguageData.SY_CA.TooltipMilkableDef: Set the item produced by milking this animal (Not restricted to liquids!)
LanguageData.SY_CA.TooltipMilkableIntervalDays: Set the interval between milkings in days
LanguageData.SY_CA.TooltipMilkableAmount: Set the amount of milk produced per milking
LanguageData.SY_CA.TooltipMoveSpeed: Set the move speed of this animal
LanguageData.SY_CA.TooltipMoveSpeedModifierGlobal: Set a movement speed modifier for all animals (Keep in mind that movement speed will still be limited to a minimum / maximum, so no crazy light speed movement)
LanguageData.SY_CA.TooltipNuzzleMtbHours: Set the nuzzle interval for this animal Negative values disables nuzzling Postiive values set the mean time in hours before an animal will nuzzle colonists when tamed
LanguageData.SY_CA.TooltipMinNuzzleMtbHours: Lowest allowed nuzzle interval for all animals Negative values disable nuzzling for all animals Positive values set a lower limit for the nuzzle interval
LanguageData.SY_CA.TooltipMaxNuzzleMtbHours: Highest allowed nuzzle interval for all animals Negative values set the nuzzle interval to unlimited (allowing for nuzzling to be disabled) Positive values enable nuzzling for all animals and set an upper limit for the nuzzle interval
LanguageData.SY_CA.TooltipPackAnimal: Set this animal as a pack animal All pack animals are required to have a pack texture, a dummy texture will be used if the animal has none Reloading is necessary for the pack texture to show up on animals carrying things
LanguageData.SY_CA.TooltipMaxPreyBodySize: Largest prey (body size) this animal will naturally hunt Does not affect manhunters, only natural predatory behaviour
LanguageData.SY_CA.TooltipPredator: Enabled or disable natural predatory behaviour for this animal
LanguageData.SY_CA.TooltipRoamMtbDaysChk: Enable or disable roaming for this animal. Roamers require a pen (A pen restricts movement and makes trainability near pointless)
LanguageData.SY_CA.TooltipRoamMtbDays: Roam interval in days. Uncheck the checkbox to disable roaming (Roamers require a pen which restricts their movement and makes trainability near pointless)
LanguageData.SY_CA.TooltipMinimumRoamMtbDaysChk: Disable roaming for all animals or activate a minimum roaming interval for animals which already are roamers (Roamers require a pen which restricts their movement and makes trainability near pointless)
LanguageData.SY_CA.TooltipMinimumRoamMtbDays: Roam interval in days. Uncheck the checkbox to disable roaming This global setting will only affect animals which already are roamers. (Roamers require a pen which restricts their movement and makes trainability near pointless)
LanguageData.SY_CA.TooltipShearableIsShearable: Set the shearability for this animal Changing this setting requires reloading to apply the settings!
LanguageData.SY_CA.TooltipShearableDef: Set the item produced by shearing this animal (Not restricted to wool!)
LanguageData.SY_CA.TooltipShearableIntervalDays: Set the interval between shearing in days
LanguageData.SY_CA.TooltipShearableAmount: Set the amount of wool produced per shearing
LanguageData.SY_CA.TooltipMaxTemperature: Set the maximum comfortable temperature for this animal. Be careful! Setting the temperature too low can result in instant heatstroke!
LanguageData.SY_CA.TooltipMinMaxTemperature: Set the lowest allowed maximum comfortable temperature for all animals
LanguageData.SY_CA.TooltipMaxMaxTemperature: Set the highest allowed maximum comfortable temperature for all animals Be careful! Setting the temperature too low can result in instant hypothermia!
LanguageData.SY_CA.TooltipMinTemperature: Set the minimum comfortable temperature for this animal. Be careful! Setting the temperature too high can result in instant hypothermia!
LanguageData.SY_CA.TooltipMinMinTemperature: Set the lowest allowed minimum comfortable temperature for all animals Be careful! Setting the temperature too high can result in instant heatstroke!
LanguageData.SY_CA.TooltipMaxMinTemperature: Set the highest allowed minimum comfortable temperature for all animals
LanguageData.SY_CA.TooltipToxicResistance: Set the toxic resistance for this animal Toxic resistance adjusts how strongly a creature is affected by toxic buildup
LanguageData.SY_CA.TooltipMinToxicResistance: Set a minimum toxic resistance for all animals
LanguageData.SY_CA.TooltipMaxToxicResistance: Set a maximum toxic resistance for all animals
LanguageData.SY_CA.TooltipTrainabilityRoamingWarning: Trainability above 'None' without removing roaming (set to 0) is of no use, as animals which require a pen cannot leave it
LanguageData.SY_CA.TooltipTrainingDecay: Adjust the rate at which training degrades A value of 1 is base speed, less decreases the rate, greater increases the rate
LanguageData.SY_CA.TooltipRescueLimit: Allow all 'Advanced' trainable animals to 'Rescue' irrespective of their body size
LanguageData.SY_CA.TooltipHaulLimit: Allow all 'Advanced' trainable animals to 'Haul' irrespective of their body size
LanguageData.SY_CA.TooltipWildness: Set the wildness for this animal (0 = 0%, 0.5 = 50%, 1 = 100%) Values of 100% or higher will make an animal untamable Keep in mind that some animals are not supposed to be tameable, especially some modded animals will throw errors when tamed!
LanguageData.SY_CA.TooltipWillNeverEatAdd: Adding plants will stop an animal from eating it Usually used to prevent animals from eating special plants, like Anima or Gauranlen trees This is only relevant to animals which can eat such plants, as an animal is always limited to its Food Type setting
LanguageData.SY_CA.TooltipWillNeverEatRemove: Removing plants will allow an animal to eat it
